_comment: Copy this to config.json and fill in your values. Do NOT commit config.json to version control if you put this in a git repo.
_user_emails_comment: All mailboxes Rocky should poll. Rocky must have delegated access to each. List rocky@... first if she also has her own inbox to watch.
_kill_switch_comment: Email addresses authorized to send 'ROCKY STOP' / 'ROCKY START' subject lines. Defaults to user_email if omitted.
_remy_comment: Remy invocation is dormant by default. Flip enable_remy_invocation to true once classifier behavior is trusted. remy_cli_path is where remy_cli.py lives on disk. remy_outputs_path is where generated drafts get written.
